definition: at a point of a surface, scalar quantity equal to the limit of the quotient of the magnitude of the component vector normal to the surface of the force acting at this point, by the area of a surface containing the point, when all the dimensions of that surface tend to zero

definition_ml.en: at a point of a surface, scalar quantity equal to the limit of the quotient of the magnitude of the component vector normal to the surface of the force acting at this point, by the area of a surface containing the point, when all the dimensions of that surface tend to zero
definition_ml.de: skalare Größe an einem Punkt einer Fläche, die gleich ist der Größe der senkrechten Komponente des Kraftvektors, die auf diesen Punkt wirkt, dividiert durch die Größe der Fläche, die den Punkt umschließt, wenn all Dimensionen der Fläche gegen Null gehen

remark: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)

remark_ml.en: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
remark_ml.de: auch verwendet von Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
